name: BaseConvo_We're Both Fools
_source: s;Krista;Man, this is all too much{tgm}...
s;Forrest;I apologize.|I wanted to congratulate you on raising the army's morale.
s;Krista;Thanks.{w}{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes} Wish I could stop being so nervous myself.
s;Forrest;This is a crucial turning point in this war.|{c:e;Forrest;CloseEyes}It is understandable you would feel this way, Krista.
s;Krista;{tgm}...{tgm} Hey, Forrest?{w} Don't die on me out there.
s;Krista;You came for me by yourself!|What were you thinking?!{br}You could have died!|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}Don't throw away your life{br}just for my sake.
s;Forrest;It's my duty to protect you. What do you want me to do?
s;Krista;Live for me, damn it!|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}You're important to me, Forrest.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}If I lose you, I won't have anything left.

s;Forrest;That's not true.|{c:e;Forrest;NormalBlink}I am merely one of many{br}in this army.|Even amongst the Medean knights, I am just another soldier.|{c:e;Forrest;HalfCloseEyes}I can easily be replaced.

s;Krista;Like hell you can!|I can't confide in anyone else but you.{br}That should be obvious.{tgm}|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}...{tgm} You know, I think I realized something.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}Or maybe I've always known.{br}I don't know.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}Forrest, all this time, you've loved me.|Loved me more than a knight should love his liege.
s;Forrest;Wh-What? I don't{tgm}...{tgm} I mean, I{tgm}...

s;Krista;To be honest, I wasn't completely sure. And maybe I was in denial too.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}But how you're acting now proves it.|You didn't come for me just out of a sense of duty. You were afraid of losing me.|Not me, your liege.{br}But me, the person you loved.

s;Forrest;{tgm}...{w}{c:e;Forrest;CloseEyes}{tgm} Yes. It's true.|{c:e;Forrest;HalfCloseEyes}It's shameful for a knight like myself to harbor these feelings.|{c:e;Forrest;CloseEyes}Shameful and selfish that I would put my own desires at the forefront|then turn around and claim my actions were done out of duty for my country.|{c:e;Forrest;NormalBlink}Please forgive me, Krista.|I've done nothing but act like a lovestruck fool|when I should have been your devoted knight through and through.

s;Krista;I guess we're both fools, then.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink,NoSmile}A ruler like me shouldn't allow a knight like you to stay under her service.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}But I never cared about being a conventional ruler.|You know that as well as I do.
s;Krista;So, do what you want, Forrest. Just remember to keep yourself alive out there.|I'm not saying this as your liege, but as someone who loves you with all her heart.
alert;Both participants gain Spd, Lck, Def, and Res +1!
alert;Krista gains Spd, Lck, Def, and Res +1!
